text: The IDF is overreacting over the FPV's because they are simply a threat not addressed yet Why do I say overreacting, because based on all details so far, Hezbullah does not have enough FPVs nor operators to pose a threat beyond annoyance and rare casualties. 1-5 FPVs a day is a very low rate to damage the Israeli army by foiling its plans by exerting a toll on it. Israeli forces are active in large numbers in south Lebanon and so far performance wise, FPVs which should be scouting and hunting much more, are barley there. Dozens if not hundreds of Israeli solders were active in Al-Qantara and dozens of trucks and vehicles were there. Nothing. This is the reality as of today. Migh change but this is it. We don't even know how many FPV operators have been martyred and if Hezbullah was able to setup simulators to train more. FPVs are the new trend. They will only be effective as long as they are used very soon in much bigger numbers. Eventually like all tools, they will be nullified. This is the nature of warfare that does not stay idle
text_zh: 以色列国防军对FPV（第一人称视角无人机）反应过度，因为它们目前仅仅是一个尚未得到解决的威胁。我之所以说反应过度，是因为根据目前的所有细节，真主党既没有足够的FPV，也没有足够的操纵员来构成除骚扰和偶尔造成伤亡之外的威胁。每天1-5架FPV的频率太低，无法通过给以色列军队造成损失来破坏其计划。以色列军队在黎巴嫩南部有大量活动，就目前的表现来看，本应进行更多侦察和猎杀的FPV几乎不见踪影。在Al-Qantara，数十甚至数百名以色列士兵在活动，还有数十辆卡车和车辆。什么都没有发生。这就是今天的现实。情况可能会改变，但目前就是这样。我们甚至不知道有多少FPV操纵员已经殉职，也不知道真主党是否能够建立模拟器来训练更多人员。FPV是新趋势。只有在不久的将来以更大的数量使用，它们才会有效。最终，像所有工具一样，它们会被抵消。这就是战争的本质，它不会停滞不前。

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 CNN: Mediators in Pakistan expect to receive a revised Iranian proposal in the coming days aimed at ending the war, with further progress in negotiations depending on whether the revised proposal is more acceptable to the U.S. Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi was due back in Tehran after a visit to Russia and is expected to consult with Iran’s leadership before any new offer is submitted. The consultation process is moving slowly because of difficulties communicating with Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei, whose location is reportedly being kept secret. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 CNN：巴基斯坦的调解人预计在未来几天内收到伊朗的一份修订提案，旨在结束战争。谈判的进一步进展取决于修订后的提案是否更能被美国接受。伊朗外交部长阿拉格齐在访问俄罗斯后应返回德黑兰，预计在提交任何新提议之前，他将与伊朗领导层进行磋商。由于与最高领袖穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊沟通困难（据报道其行踪保密），磋商过程进展缓慢。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 Israeli Channel 12: In an IDF intelligence briefing to the Knesset Foreign Affairs and Defense Committee, senior military intelligence officials stated that Iran has partially restored its ballistic missile array. Iranian Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei is alive. The Lebanese president’s direct negotiations with Israel are putting his life in danger. Strikes in Beirut are not currently on the agenda, but approval exists to strike emerging threats. Disarming Hezbollah remains a long-term goal. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 以色列第12频道：在以色列国防军向议会外交与国防委员会提交的情报简报中，高级军事情报官员表示，伊朗已部分恢复了其弹道导弹阵列。伊朗最高领袖穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊还活着。黎巴嫩总统与以色列的直接谈判使他的生命处于危险之中。目前贝鲁特的袭击不在议程上，但已批准打击新出现的威胁。解除真主党的武装仍然是一个长期目标。@wfwitness

text: Two soldiers sustained injuries following a hostile Israeli strike targeting an army patrol—which included Civil Defense personnel and two civilian bulldozers—in the town of Majdal Zoun (Tyre), while they were engaged in a rescue operation for civilians.
text_zh: 在马吉达尔祖恩（提尔）镇，两名士兵在执行平民救援任务时，遭到以色列针对一支军队巡逻队（包括民防人员和两辆平民推土机）的敌对袭击而受伤。

text: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 i24NEWS: Turkey has offered to mediate between the United States and Lebanon to help resolve the Hezbollah issue. The offer came in the recent period, but the Trump administration has not yet responded. The Lebanese government is also unenthusiastic, due to concerns about increasing Turkish influence in the country. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 i24NEWS：土耳其提议在美黎之间进行调解，以帮助解决真主党问题。该提议是在近期提出的，但特朗普政府尚未作出回应。由于担心土耳其在该国的影响力日益增强，黎巴嫩政府对此也不太热心。 @wfwitness

text: 📝 Бои на восточном фланге 📝 На Бурлукском направлении подразделения группировки войск «Север» продолжают расширять зону контроля в приграничной зоне Харьковской области . Бои на всей протяженности линии фронта постепенно набирают обороты с начала апреля и появления зеленой растительности, что позволяет штурмовикам более безопасно перемещаться в обширных лесах. ➡️ Российские бойцы заняли большую часть населенного пункта Землянки на восточном фланге направления. На южной окраине продолжается зачистка подвалов строений, примыкающих к соседним Бударкам . ➡️ За последние две недели активность ВС РФ на участке значительно возросла. Постоянные атаки малыми группами на разных участках направления вынуждают противника раздергивать резервы в попытке угадать будущее направление удара. В этот момент штурмовики проводят атаки на другом участке, где ВСУ не ждут новых продвижений. ➡️ Зачищены Волчанские Хутора , Зыбино и Бочково , начались бои за Покаляное и Охримовку . Скорее всего, ВС РФ будут идти навстречу тем подразделениям, которые атакуют со стороны Волчанска на восток, с целью соединить несколько разрозненных плацдармов «по земле» в один большой. Для этого предстоит освободить Малую Волчью, Николаевку, Шабельное, Рубленое и Артельное . Тогда плацдарм будет простираться единым рубежом от Старицы на западе аж до Двуречанского на юго-востоке. 📌 Конечно, формирование «пояса безопасности» в 2026 году утратило свой первоначальный смысл с ростом дальности полета FPV-дронов. Но присутствие в приграничье позволяет выставлять наблюдательные посты для контроля активности уже на украинской территории, загодя пресекая возможные попытки выдвижения бронетехники или групп пехоты к передовой. Если у Вас есть дополнения по обстановке, Вы хотите, чтобы мы подсветили успехи Вашего подразделения, — Вы всегда можете написать нам в бот обратной связи @rybar_feedback_bot 📍 Карта в высоком разрешении 📍 English version 📍 Онлайн-карты доступны по подписке на map.rybar.ru #дайджест #карта #Россия #Украина ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 东线战斗 📝 在布尔卢克方向，“北方”部队集团的各单位继续扩大哈尔科夫州边境地区的控制区。自四月开始且绿色植被出现以来，整个前线的战斗逐渐升温，这使得突击部队能够更安全地在广阔的森林中移动。 ➡️ 俄罗斯士兵占领了该方向东侧定居点泽姆利亚基的大部分地区。在南郊，对毗邻布达尔基的建筑物地下室的清理工作仍在继续。 ➡️ 过去两周，俄军在该地区的活动显著增加。在不同地段不断进行的小规模突击迫使敌方分散预备队，试图猜测未来的打击方向。此时，突击部队正在乌军未预料到会有新进展的其他地段发动攻击。 ➡️ 沃尔昌斯克胡托拉、济比诺和博奇科沃已被清理，针对波卡利亚诺和奥赫里莫夫卡的战斗已经开始。俄军很可能会与从沃尔昌斯克向东进攻的部队会合，旨在将几个分散的“地面”桥头堡连接成一个大的桥头堡。为此，需要解放马拉亚沃尔恰、尼古拉耶夫卡、沙别利诺耶、鲁布列诺耶和阿尔捷利诺耶。届时，桥头堡将形成一条从西部的斯塔里察一直延伸到东南部的德沃列昌斯基的统一防线。 📌 当然，随着FPV无人机飞行距离的增加，2026年形成“安全带”的初衷已经失去了意义。但在边境地区的存在使得我们可以设立观察哨，以监控乌克兰境内的活动，提前阻止装甲车辆或步兵小组向前方推进的任何企图。如果您对局势有补充，或者希望我们突出您所在部队的成功，您可以随时通过反馈机器人 @rybar_feedback_bot 给我们写信 📍 高分辨率地图 📍 英文版本 📍 在线地图可通过订阅 map.rybar.ru 获取 #摘要 #地图 #俄罗斯 #乌克兰 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Fotros Resistance: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 | US Navy harassed and boarded a ship they suspected to be headed for Iranian ports—but released it after finding out that they were wrong. The US Navy presence in waters 11.000km away from their shores continues to be a pain in the *ss for worldwide shipping. @FotrosResistancee
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Fotros Resistance： 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 | 美国海军骚扰并登上一艘他们怀疑前往伊朗港口的船只——但在发现搞错后将其释放。美国海军在距离其海岸11000公里的水域的存在，继续成为全球航运的眼中钉。 @FotrosResistancee

text: Open Source Intel WILD FOOTAGE 🔴 Full footage from inside a giant Hezbollah tunnel in Kantara, southern Lebanon. 25 meters underground, 10 km from the Israeli border. Tour led by a commander from the IDF's Yahalom engineering unit. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049176977794310498/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 狂野镜头 🔴 黎巴嫩南部坎塔拉一个巨大的真主党隧道内部的完整镜头。地下25米，距离以色列边境10公里。参观由以色列国防军雅哈洛姆工程部队的一名指挥官带领。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049176977794310498/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF released footage of two Hezbollah tunnels built over approximately a decade, showing underground shelter cities before the operation to destroy them. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049175093469741396/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列国防军发布了关于两座建造了大约十年的真主党隧道的镜头，展示了在摧毁行动之前的地下避难所城市。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049175093469741396/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) has published video showing U.S. Marines with the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit (MEU) boarding the M/V Blue Star 3, which was suspected of attempting to violate the U.S. naval blockade of Iran. Following the boarding, U.S. forces determined the ship's itinerary would not include an Iranian port call and released the ship. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）发布了一段视频，显示第31海军陆战队远征部队（MEU）的美国海军陆战队员登上了“蓝星3号”货轮，该船被怀疑试图违反美国对伊朗的海军封锁。登船后，美军确定该船的行程不包括停靠伊朗港口，并释放了该船。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) On Tuesday, U.S. Marines from the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit boarded the M/V BLUE STAR 3 container ship during an operation in the Arabian Sea. The vessel was suspected of attempting to transit to Iran in violation of the U.S. blockade of Iranian ports. Per CENTCOM, the ship was after conducting a search and confirming the ship’s voyage would not include an Iranian port call. 🎥 U.S. Central Command tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）周二，来自第31海军陆战队远征部队的美国海军陆战队员在阿拉伯海的一次行动中登上了“蓝星3号”集装箱船。该船被怀疑试图违反美国对伊朗港口的封锁前往伊朗。据中央司令部称，在进行搜查并确认该船的航程不包括停靠伊朗港口后，该船被放行。 🎥 美国中央司令部 推文

text: Open Source Intel CENTCOM: Earlier today in the Arabian Sea, U.S. Marines from the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit boarded M/V Blue Star III, a commercial ship suspected of attempting to transit to Iran in violation of the U.S. blockade of Iranian ports. U.S. forces released the vessel after conducting a search and confirming the ship’s voyage would not include an Iranian port call. American forces continue to operate and enforce the blockade across the Middle East. So far, 39 vessels have been redirected to ensure compliance. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 中央司令部：今天早些时候在阿拉伯海，来自第31海军陆战队远征部队的美国海军陆战队员登上了“蓝星3号”货轮，这是一艘被怀疑试图违反美国对伊朗港口封锁而前往伊朗的商船。美军在进行搜查并确认该船的航程不包括停靠伊朗港口后释放了该船。美军继续在中东地区行动并执行封锁。到目前为止，已有39艘船只被改道以确保合规。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu said a huge Hezbollah tunnel was destroyed today. “We are destroying their terror infrastructure, killing dozens of terrorists – and our hand is still extended.” Israel is operating inside the security zone, south…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Footage of a tour of the Hezbollah tunnel coined as the “underground shelter city” by the IDF. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列总理内塔尼亚胡表示，今天摧毁了一条巨大的真主党隧道。‘我们正在摧毁他们的恐怖基础设施，消灭数十名恐怖分子——我们的手仍然伸着。’以色列正在安全区内行动，南部……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军称之为“地下避难所城市”的真主党隧道参观镜头。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel IDF destroyed two major Hezbollah tunnels in southern Lebanon today using 450 tons of explosives. The tunnels in Qantara span ~2 km, reach 25 meters deep, and were built over a decade with direct Iranian funding and guidance. Inside: weapons, bunk beds, and rocket launchers aimed at Israel. The military says they were designed as a staging ground for a Hezbollah invasion of the Galilee that never materialized. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列国防军今天使用450吨炸药摧毁了黎巴嫩南部的两条主要真主党隧道。位于坎塔拉的隧道跨度约2公里，深达25米，是在伊朗的直接资助和指导下历时十年建造的。内部：武器、双层床和瞄准以色列的火箭发射器。军方表示，它们被设计为真主党入侵加利利的集结地，但从未实现。推文

text: U.S. Central Command Earlier today in the Arabian Sea, U.S. Marines from the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit boarded M/V Blue Star III, a commercial ship suspected of attempting to transit to Iran in violation of the U.S. blockade of Iranian ports. U.S. forces released the vessel after conducting a search and confirming the ship’s voyage would not include an Iranian port call. American forces continue to operate and enforce the blockade across the Middle East. So far, 39 vessels have been redirected to ensure compliance. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 今天早些时候在阿拉伯海，来自第31海军陆战队远征部队的美国海军陆战队员登上了“蓝星3号”货轮，这是一艘被怀疑试图违反美国对伊朗港口封锁而前往伊朗的商船。美军在进行搜查并确认该船的航程不包括停靠伊朗港口后释放了该船。美军继续在中东地区行动并执行封锁。到目前为止，已有39艘船只被改道以确保合规。推文

text: U.S. Central Command RT @USAmbUN : Iran’s attacks in the Strait of Hormuz are an assault on the world’s economy. Nearly 100 countries — including the Gulf nations Iran has attacked — came together this morning to condemn Iran’s actions. https://twitter.com/USAmbUN/status/2048872777457836193/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 转发 @USAmbUN：伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡的袭击是对世界经济的攻击。近100个国家——包括伊朗袭击的海湾国家——今天上午齐聚一堂，谴责伊朗的行动。 https://twitter.com/USAmbUN/status/2048872777457836193/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Pakistan is facing its worst energy crisis in years, with rolling blackouts lasting up to 14 hours in rural areas. The government has imposed austerity measures, including two-hour daily power cuts, a four-day work week, halved fuel allocations for government vehicles, and even asked cricket fans to watch matches from home to save fuel. Subsidies were scrapped and fuel prices raised. Nearly all of Pakistan’s LNG comes from Qatar, but shipments stopped in March due to regional disruptions. This has forced the country to buy expensive spot-market LNG for the first time in over two years. Meanwhile, Pakistan secured $1.2 billion from the IMF and $3 billion from Saudi Arabia to support its reserves. - Financial Post. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 巴基斯坦正面临多年来最严重的能源危机，农村地区轮流停电长达14小时。政府实施了紧缩措施，包括每天两小时的停电、每周四天的工作制、政府车辆燃油配额减半，甚至要求板球迷在家观看比赛以节省燃料。补贴被取消，燃油价格上涨。巴基斯坦几乎所有的液化天然气（LNG）都来自卡塔尔，但由于地区动荡，运输在三月份停止。这迫使该国两年来首次购买昂贵的现货市场液化天然气。与此同时，巴基斯坦从国际货币基金组织获得了12亿美元，从沙特阿拉伯获得了30亿美元以支持其储备。 - 金融邮报。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) The mushroom cloud from the fire at the Tuapse oil refinery visible from the Krasnaya Polyana ski resort located near Sochi. 100 kilometers away. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2049169813285556578/photo/1 Apocalyptic scenes in the city of Tuapse in southern Russia after the local oil refinery got hit by Ukrainian strikes for the third time in one month last night. Massive cloud of smoke can be seen covering the sun over Tuapse as the refinery continues to burn. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2049059658413858898/video/1 - Status-6 (War & Military News) tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）从位于索契附近的红波利亚纳滑雪胜地可以看到图阿普谢炼油厂火灾产生的蘑菇云。距离100公里。 https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2049169813285556578/photo/1 昨晚当地炼油厂在一个月内第三次遭到乌克兰袭击后，俄罗斯南部图阿普谢市出现了末日般的景象。可以看到巨大的烟云覆盖了图阿普谢上空的太阳，炼油厂仍在燃烧。 https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2049059658413858898/video/1 - Status-6（战争与军事新闻）推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Footage of the ongoing demonstrations on Israel's Highway 4. Demonstrations were also reported in front of the Jerusalem Municipality. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列4号公路正在进行的示威活动画面。据报道，耶路撒冷市政府前也发生了示威活动。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Central Command announced that Marines from the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit boarded the commercial vessel M/V Blue Star III in the Arabian Sea earlier today, suspecting it of attempting to transit to Iran in violation of the U.S. blockade on Iranian ports. After a search confirmed the ship’s voyage would not include an Iranian port call, the vessel was released. American forces continue to enforce the blockade across the Middle East; 39 vessels have so far been redirected to ensure compliance. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国中央司令部宣布，第31海军陆战队远征部队的海军陆战队员今天早些时候在阿拉伯海登上了商船“蓝星三号”（M/V Blue Star III），怀疑其试图违反美国对伊朗港口的封锁前往伊朗。在搜查确认该船的航程不包括停靠伊朗港口后，该船被放行。美军继续在中东地区执行封锁；迄今为止已有39艘船只被改道以确保合规。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu said a huge Hezbollah tunnel was destroyed today. “We are destroying their terror infrastructure, killing dozens of terrorists – and our hand is still extended.” Israel is operating inside the security zone, south of the Litani, north of the Litani, and in the Bekaa valley. Netanyahu added that he gave instructions weeks ago for a special project to eliminate the drone threat. “It will take time – but we will destroy that too.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理内塔尼亚胡表示，今天摧毁了一条巨大的真主党隧道。“我们正在摧毁他们的恐怖基础设施，消灭了数十名恐怖分子——但我们的手仍然伸向和平。”以色列正在安全区内行动，包括利塔尼河以南、利塔尼河以北以及贝卡谷地。内塔尼亚胡补充说，他几周前就下达了指示，启动一个消除无人机威胁的特别项目。“这需要时间——但我们也会摧毁它。”@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Footage of the alleged Hezbollah tunnel from the inside that was detonated by Israeli forces. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Army Radio: The Israeli military has destroyed Hezbollah's largest underground tunnel found to date in southern Lebanon—a two-kilometre "city of refuge" complex located 11 kilometres from the Israeli border. Allegedly built and funded by Iran, the tunnel contained living quarters and assembly areas capable of housing hundreds or even thousands of fighters and was designed as a "springboard" for Radwan Force attacks into Israel. The entrance was camouflaged; inside, troops found anti-tank missiles aimed at Misgav Am and the Ramim ridge, as well as Iranian combat doctrine manuals detailing IDF operational vulnerabilities. More than 450 tons of explosives were used to collapse the entire route. Three similar but smaller tunnels were found during a previous campaign, but none matched the scale of this one. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列军队引爆的据称是真主党隧道的内部画面。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列陆军电台：以色列军方摧毁了迄今为止在黎巴嫩南部发现的真主党最大的地下隧道——一个位于距离以色列边境11公里处、长达两公里的“避难城”综合体。据称该隧道由伊朗建造和资助，内部设有生活区和集结区，可容纳数百甚至数千名武装人员，旨在作为拉德万部队（Radwan Force）袭击以色列的“跳板”。入口经过伪装；士兵在内部发现了瞄准米斯加夫阿姆（Misgav Am）和拉米姆（Ramim）山脊的反坦克导弹，以及详细说明以色列国防军作战弱点的伊朗作战条令手册。超过450吨炸药被用于摧毁整条路线。在之前的行动中曾发现过三条类似但规模较小的隧道，但没有一条能与此规模相提并论。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Kan : Israel has set a two‑week deadline for negotiations with Lebanon, warning that it cannot wait indefinitely. “We are giving another two weeks for the negotiation opportunity – and that’s it,” an Israeli source said. After that, Israel plans to resume intensive fighting against Hezbollah. The current ceasefire is extended until mid‑May. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Kan：以色列已为与黎巴嫩的谈判设定了两周的最后期限，并警告称无法无限期等待。一位以色列消息人士称：“我们再给两周的谈判机会——仅此而已。”此后，以色列计划恢复对真主党的密集打击。目前的停火协议已延长至5月中旬。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇦🇪UAE Energy Minister Al Mazroui reassured that the UAE will not shock the oil market by drastically increasing production. "And one of the questions that I did put to the minister here is once things normalize on the Straits, can we expect a huge uptick…" ⚡️ 🇦🇪 🇸🇦 UAE Energy Minister Al Mazourei clarified that the decision isn't connected to any political rifts with OPEC members, such as Saudi Arabia. "It has no political linkage. Our relationship with all of the producers will remain there. They are neighbors. They are partners in many shapes and forms. And as an active and a proactive producer, UAE will always be there. We're not disappearing from the market. We are a responsible producer. We just want to have the freedom to take the decisions that are required due to the situations that we are living in." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇦🇪阿联酋能源部长马兹鲁伊（Al Mazroui）重申，阿联酋不会通过大幅增加产量来冲击石油市场。‘我向部长提出的问题之一是，一旦海峡局势正常化，我们是否可以预期产量会有大幅增长……’” ⚡️ 🇦🇪 🇸🇦 阿联酋能源部长马兹鲁伊澄清说，这一决定与沙特阿拉伯等欧佩克成员国的任何政治分歧无关。“这与政治无关。我们与所有生产国的关系将保持不变。他们是邻居。他们在许多方面都是合作伙伴。作为一个积极主动的生产国，阿联酋将永远在那里。我们不会从市场上消失。我们是一个负责任的生产国。我们只是希望有自由来根据我们所处的局势做出必要的决定。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 i24NEWS: Pakistan expects to receive a “revised Iranian proposal” in the coming days, after U.S. President Trump expressed dissatisfaction with the last offer sent to Washington. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 i24NEWS：在特朗普总统对送交华盛顿的上一份提议表示不满后，巴基斯坦预计将在未来几天收到一份“修订后的伊朗提议”。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 An Ultra-Orthodox demonstration is currently taking place on Route 4 near Bnei Brak. They are demonstrating against the Israeli reserve law bill. Demonstrators are blocking the road and clashing with police. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 一场极端正统派示威活动目前正在贝内贝拉克（Bnei Brak）附近的4号公路上进行。他们正在抗议以色列的预备役法案。示威者封锁了道路并与警察发生冲突。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇦🇪UAE Energy Minister Al Mazroui explians why they left OPEC at the right time. "The decision is taken at the right time in our view because it's not going to hugely impact the market. The market is undersupplied. And because of the unfortunate closure…" ⚡️ 🇦🇪 UAE Energy Minister Al Mazroui reassured that the UAE will not shock the oil market by drastically increasing production. "And one of the questions that I did put to the minister here is once things normalize on the Straits, can we expect a huge uptick in production out of The UAE because they're no longer gonna be constrained by this group? And he said: 'we have significant resources locally and globally, and we are not going to shock the market.'" @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇦🇪阿联酋能源部长马兹鲁伊解释了他们为何在合适的时机离开欧佩克。‘我们认为这个决定是在合适的时机做出的，因为它不会对市场产生巨大影响。市场供应不足。由于不幸的关闭……’” ⚡️ 🇦🇪 阿联酋能源部长马兹鲁伊重申，阿联酋不会通过大幅增加产量来冲击石油市场。‘我向部长提出的问题之一是，一旦海峡局势正常化，我们是否可以预期阿联酋的产量会有大幅增长，因为他们不再受该组织的限制？他说：‘我们在本地和全球都有重要的资源，我们不会冲击市场。’’” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 i24NEWS: Israeli military intelligence has identified that Hezbollah plans to significantly expand its use of drones in the current phase of the campaign and has begun concentrating efforts to cut the group’s entire drone value chain – including suppliers, operators and equipment. A targeted warning was issued several weeks ago. The move mirrors previous operations against Hezbollah’s Unit 127 when the UAV threat intensified. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 i24NEWS：以色列军事情报部门已确定，真主党计划在当前阶段的行动中大幅扩大无人机的使用，并已开始集中精力切断该组织的整个无人机价值链——包括供应商、操作员和设备。几周前已发出针对性警告。此举反映了此前在无人机威胁加剧时针对真主党第127部队的行动。@wfwitness

text: Israeli Minister Amichai Chikli says Israel is establishing a new “border line” with Lebanon: Even during this so-called ceasefire, the IDF continues destroying infrastructure and effectively stabilizing the new border line of the State of Israel.
text_zh: 以色列部长阿米海·奇克利（Amichai Chikli）表示，以色列正在与黎巴嫩建立一条新的“边界线”：即使在所谓的停火期间，以色列国防军仍在继续摧毁基础设施，并有效地稳固以色列国的新边界线。

text: New attacks in Mansouri, Froon, Kfartabneet
text_zh: 曼苏里（Mansouri）、弗隆（Froon）、卡法塔布内特（Kfartabneet）发生新袭击

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 The spokesperson for Iran’s parliamentary National Security Commission Ebrahim Azizi said that during Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi’s recent trip to Islamabad, no meetings or negotiations were held with American officials, and no messages were exchanged between the two sides. A deputy foreign minister briefed the commission that nuclear negotiations were not on the agenda. The purpose of the trip was bilateral relations and regional developments, contradicting some Western media reports that suggested indirect contacts. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 伊朗议会国家安全委员会发言人易卜拉欣·阿齐兹（Ebrahim Azizi）表示，在伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐（Abbas Araghchi）最近访问伊斯兰堡期间，没有与美国官员举行任何会晤或谈判，双方也没有交换任何信息。一位外交部副部长向委员会通报称，核谈判不在议程之内。此次访问的目的是双边关系和地区发展，这反驳了一些西方媒体关于存在间接接触的报道。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇦🇪 The United Arab Emirates has announced its withdrawal from OPEC and OPEC+, effective 1 May 2026. Now you may ask, what does this mean? The move comes during the largest oil supply disruption in history, as the Iran war has shut the Strait of Hormuz…" ⚡️ 🇦🇪 UAE Energy Minister Al Mazroui explians why they left OPEC at the right time. "The decision is taken at the right time in our view because it's not going to hugely impact the market. The market is undersupplied. And because of the unfortunate closure of the Strait of Hormuz, and the level of inventories that we have, unfortunately seeing the world go through this unprecedented time where the level of inventories are going down significantly would require extraordinary measures. With the agility of UAE decision-making, we believe leaving the group now will enable us to attain market requirements at a pace that is appropriate from our point of view." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇦🇪阿拉伯联合酋长国宣布退出欧佩克和欧佩克+，自2026年5月1日起生效。现在你可能会问，这意味着什么？此举正值历史上最大的石油供应中断之际，因为伊朗战争已经关闭了霍尔木兹海峡……” ⚡️ 🇦🇪 阿联酋能源部长马兹鲁伊解释了他们为何在合适的时机离开欧佩克。“我们认为这个决定是在合适的时机做出的，因为它不会对市场产生巨大影响。市场供应不足。由于霍尔木兹海峡不幸关闭，以及我们拥有的库存水平，不幸的是，看到世界经历这个前所未有的时期，库存水平大幅下降，这将需要采取非常措施。凭借阿联酋决策的灵活性，我们相信现在离开该组织将使我们能够以我们认为合适的步伐满足市场需求。” @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel WATCH 🔴 Israel’s foreign minister blasted Volodymyr Zelenskyy after Zelenskyy accused Israel of allowing a ship carrying allegedly stolen Ukrainian grain from Russia to dock at an Israeli port. “Let me lay down the facts” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049168093402812910/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报观察 🔴 以色列外交部长抨击了弗拉基米尔·泽连斯基，此前泽连斯基指责以色列允许一艘载有据称从俄罗斯窃取的乌克兰谷物的船只停靠在以色列港口。“让我陈述事实” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049168093402812910/video/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix You reject X diplomacy? You my guy? Seriously? X is a great platform, but we reject “Twitter diplomacy”. During a Press Conference today with Serbia’s FM, I was asked about the surprising allegations put forward publicly by Ukraine. This was my answer >> https://twitter.com/gidonsaar/status/2049152954876244333/video/1 - Gideon Sa'ar | גדעון סער tweet
text_zh: 努诺·费利克斯（Nuno Felix）你拒绝X外交？你是认真的吗？X是一个很棒的平台，但我们拒绝“推特外交”。在今天与塞尔维亚外交部长举行的联合新闻发布会上，我被问及乌克兰公开提出的令人惊讶的指控。这是我的回答 >> https://twitter.com/gidonsaar/status/2049152954876244333/video/1 - 吉德翁·萨尔（Gideon Sa'ar）| גדעון סער 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @tleilax___ : Iran managed to shut down in an orderly fashion its production before. After the cancellation of the JCPOA by Donnie, and also during Covid. No idea why people think it would bring catastrophic damage now. https://twitter.com/tleilax___/status/2049159405690589574/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 努诺·费利克斯 转发 @tleilax___ ：伊朗之前曾设法有序地关闭其生产。在唐尼（Donnie）取消伊核协议（JCPOA）之后，以及在新冠疫情期间也是如此。不知道为什么人们认为现在会带来灾难性的破坏。https://twitter.com/tleilax___/status/2049159405690589574/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Pakistani sources tell CNN that mediators expect a revised Iranian offer to end the war within days. Trump rejected the previous proposal. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 巴基斯坦消息人士告诉CNN，调解人预计几天内会收到一份修订后的伊朗提议以结束战争。特朗普拒绝了之前的提议。推文

text: Open Source Intel Prof. John Mearsheimer on Iran's view of U.S. negotiators: "They're negotiating with Netanyahu's puppets. They don't want to deal with those two. They see Kushner as essentially an Israeli proxy, and Witkoff, not only as a Zionist, but also as someone who has demonstrated massive incompetence in negotiations with both the Iranians and the Russians." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 约翰·米尔斯海默（John Mearsheimer）教授谈伊朗对美国谈判代表的看法：“他们是在与内塔尼亚胡的傀儡谈判。他们不想与那两个人打交道。他们认为库什纳本质上是以色列的代理人，而威特科夫（Witkoff）不仅是一个犹太复国主义者，而且在与伊朗人和俄罗斯人的谈判中表现出了极大的无能。” 推文

text: WarTranslated The Russian war criminal Putin declared that the difficulties are temporary, and that Russia is eternal. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2049162225244426417/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 俄罗斯战犯普京宣称困难是暂时的，俄罗斯是永恒的。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2049162225244426417/video/1 推文

text: Israeli Minister Amichai Chikli: If your God is commanding to massacre and rape innocent women, to massacre children in front of their parents, then we’re not speaking about religion.
text_zh: 以色列部长阿米海·奇克利：如果你的上帝命令屠杀和强奸无辜妇女，在父母面前屠杀儿童，那么我们谈论的就不是宗教。

text: 19-year-old Israeli soldier Idan Fox was killed in southern Lebanon in a Hezbollah drone attack. He had not yet received his high school diploma before his death. Israel’s Education Minister visited his family and personally handed the diploma to his parents.
text_zh: 19岁的以色列士兵伊丹·福克斯（Idan Fox）在黎巴嫩南部的一场真主党无人机袭击中丧生。他在去世前还没来得及拿到高中毕业证书。以色列教育部长探望了他的家人，并亲自将毕业证书交给了他的父母。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱A massive crater was left in Qantara, southern Lebanon, after the massive demolition. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Footage of the alleged Hezbollah tunnel from the inside that was detonated by Israeli forces. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱黎巴嫩南部坎塔拉（Qantara）在遭到大规模爆破后留下了一个巨大的弹坑。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列军队引爆的所谓真主党隧道的内部画面。@wfwitness

text: Israeli Minister Amichai Chikli: We had an embargo led by the Biden administration. Bombs for our airplanes could not be delivered. And this all changed after Trump came into power. We are so thankful for the bravery of Trump and his team — Vance, Rubio, and Hegseth — this is a tremendous administration.
text_zh: 以色列部长阿米哈伊·奇克利（Amichai Chikli）：我们曾受到拜登政府领导的禁运。我们飞机的炸弹无法交付。而在特朗普上台后，这一切都改变了。我们非常感谢特朗普及其团队——万斯（Vance）、卢比奥（Rubio）和海格塞斯（Hegseth）——的勇气，这是一个了不起的政府。

text: Israeli Minister Amichai Chikli: We have a very significant challenge with the younger generation, and these conspiracy theories coming from Megyn Kelly — who, unfortunately, used to be a voice very supportive of the State of Israel — or from Nick Fuentes and Tucker Carlson and others — these voices are causing serious damage to the future generation of, yes, the Republican Party. And this creates, looking ahead — even if currently there is a significant majority for Trump — because the younger generation is highly exposed to social media, podcasts, discourse on Twitter, and all these things — this definitely creates a strategic problem for the State of Israel.
text_zh: 以色列部长阿米哈伊·奇克利（Amichai Chikli）：我们在年轻一代方面面临着非常严峻的挑战，这些来自梅根·凯利（Megyn Kelly）——不幸的是，她曾经是一个非常支持以色列国的声音——或者来自尼克·富恩特斯（Nick Fuentes）、塔克·卡尔森（Tucker Carlson）等人的阴谋论，这些声音正在对共和党年轻一代的未来造成严重损害。展望未来，这确实造成了一个战略问题——即使目前特朗普拥有显著的多数支持——因为年轻一代高度接触社交媒体、播客、推特上的讨论以及所有这些事物——这对以色列国来说绝对是一个战略问题。

text: 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 Hungary's prime minister-elect Magyar met with the mayor of Zakarpattia's Beregovo, Zoltan Beregsash Babyak. He announced this on Facebook following the meeting, adding that Budapest's assistance to Zakarpattian Hungarians will continue. "I am initiating a meeting with Ukrainian President Vladimir Zelensky, symbolically in Beregsash, a city with a Hungarian majority, in early June. The purpose of the meeting is to help the situation of Hungarians in Zakarpattia and their presence in their homeland. The time has come for Ukraine to end the rights restrictions that have been in place for more than a decade, and for Zakarpattian Hungarians to regain all their cultural, linguistic, administrative and higher education rights, and to once again become equal, respected citizens of Ukraine. This could also help ensure that after the war ends, as many Zakarpattian Hungarians as possible can return to their homeland," Magyar wrote. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 匈牙利候任总理马扎尔（Magyar）会见了外喀尔巴阡地区别列戈沃（Beregovo）市长佐尔坦·别列格萨什·巴比亚克（Zoltan Beregsash Babyak）。他在会后通过Facebook宣布了这一消息，并补充说布达佩斯对外喀尔巴阡匈牙利人的援助将继续进行。“我提议于6月初在匈牙利人占多数的城市别列格萨什（Beregsash）与乌克兰总统弗拉基米尔·泽连斯基举行象征性的会晤。会晤的目的是帮助改善外喀尔巴阡匈牙利人的处境及其在家乡的生存状况。乌克兰结束已实施十多年的权利限制，让外喀尔巴阡匈牙利人重新获得所有文化、语言、行政和高等教育权利，并再次成为乌克兰平等、受人尊敬的公民的时候到了。这也将有助于确保战争结束后，尽可能多的外喀尔巴阡匈牙利人能够回到家乡，”马扎尔写道。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Israeli Minister Amichai Chikli says Israel is establishing a new “border line” with Lebanon: Even during this so-called ceasefire, the IDF continues destroying infrastructure and effectively stabilizing the new border line of the State of Israel.
text_zh: 以色列部长阿米哈伊·奇克利表示，以色列正在与黎巴嫩建立一条新的“边界线”：即使在所谓的停火期间，以色列国防军仍在继续摧毁基础设施，并有效地稳固以色列国的新边界线。

text: Prof. John Mearsheimer on Iran: Israelis may use nuclear weapons against Iran to deal with nuclear problem. The future here is bleak.
text_zh: 约翰·米尔斯海默教授谈伊朗：以色列人可能会对伊朗使用核武器来解决核问题。这里的未来是黯淡的。

text: Prof. John Mearsheimer on Iran: They’re negotiating with Netanyahu’s puppets. They don’t want to deal with those two. They see Kushner as essentially an Israeli proxy, and Witkoff—not only as a Zionist—but also as someone who has demonstrated massive incompetence in negotiations with both the Iranians and the Russians.
text_zh: 约翰·米尔斯海默教授谈伊朗：他们正在与内塔尼亚胡的傀儡进行谈判。他们不想与那两个人打交道。他们认为库什纳本质上是以色列的代理人，而威特科夫不仅是一个犹太复国主义者，而且在与伊朗人和俄罗斯人的谈判中表现出了极大的无能。

text: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 ⚡ Oil prices jumped today, climbing back above $110 per barrel. - Insiderpaper 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 ⚡ 油价今日跳涨，回升至每桶110美元以上。 - Insiderpaper 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

"The IDF has just destroyed in a huge explosion an underground terror infrastructure in Qantara, Lebanon, within the new…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 A massive crater was left in Qantara, southern Lebanon, after Israeli airsrikes targeted sub terrainian infrastructure in the area. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱以色列国防部长卡茨报告称，以色列袭击了黎巴嫩南部坎塔拉真主党使用的地下隧道。‘以色列国防军刚刚在黎巴嫩坎塔拉的一次大爆炸中摧毁了一个地下恐怖基础设施，位于新的……’ ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列空袭袭击了黎巴嫩南部坎塔拉的地下基础设施后，当地留下了一个巨大的弹坑。 @wfwitness
